requirements: Use CommandRuntime only for strict argument mapping and Binding/package target validation
Emit command.invoked after argument and mapped Operation schema validation
Route through the exact derived Subscription defaults and protected Operation gateway
Emit correlated command.completed with durable success or failure evidence
Define revisioned View, actions, cursor, and ViewDelta replay before stabilizing Surface.render
Supply authenticated viewer construction for SlotCatalog; never export caller-composable catalog authority injection
